review_title: Simply the best of cloud software
description: I love OneHub. It's best in the market for its price. No other software provides the same features for even half the price. The ease of use and support makes it a winner.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's extremely easy to use, is simple and efficient for most files, and makes collaboration easy. The VDR and FTP features are my favorite. There is very little learning curve - you deploy it, set up your files, and it will do the magic!
cons: Nothing, really. If there's anything, I think the UI is a bit old fashioned, and newcomers aren't familiar with the software. That's it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jennifer S.
pros: Onehub is my go-to for document sharing. We are in the intellectual property business - patents - and sharing information with our attorneys and knowing what we are sharing is secure it of utmost importance. Onehub gives my company the security it needs!
cons: Nothing at all - I love Onehub! Nothing compares

author: France D.
pros: so easy to learn, you click and you find what you looking for
cons: expensive for the functions limited in the software

review_title: This is a must for owning your own business
description: I am so glad my bookkeeper told me about Onehub. It keeps me organized and if I ever need to find a receipt it's there. Perfect for tax time
author: Dana B.
pros: It is so easy to connect your bank, sub contractors, statements, etc. I love that all my information is in one place. I can easily find transactions, payments, and receipts.
cons: I would like to see catagories for different venders. It would be great if the same vendor had their own file

review_title: Intuitive and no issues in various browsers
description: Works fine, English sales support was well educated.
author: Wolfram B.
pros: The path structure is easy to set up. Maintenance of documents by search function works.
cons: The roles is something you do not select everyday. The explanation of the roles could be help-buttoned easier.

description: Overall I’m satisfied with Onehub but I’m disappointed that other then the app there has not been major improvements in functionality of the desktop and that the iPhone app doesn’t at least do what the website can.
author: Anthony C.
pros: The ability to replace a traditional file cabinet online
cons: 1. The inability to color code files 2. The inability to make files “Favorite” and have them up top 3. The inability to send document links from the app 4. I wish there was a plan room I could share with clients

description: our only complaint is that it is not friendly to provide access to people who need to allow someone else - and the reporting who has accessed is not helpful
author: Patty B.
pros: ability to securely share files - we are a forensic accounting firm that has a need to share sometimes large confidential files
cons: providing access is tricky with the link and once someone has access they don't get invited again and claim they don't have a log in

description: Love the product for my basic document-client portal needs.
author: Siril V.
pros: I love the ease of use of the software for myself and my clients. The mobile app makes the documents accessible at any time...even on the go!
cons: Wish there was a way to make certain documents invisible within a visible folder, similar to "Document" by CCH.

review_title: The essential digital data room functions
author: Abram B.
pros: Ease of setup and use were essential. The same functionality that made it easy for us to adopt has made it easy to onboard additional users both inside and outside our organization. It is also dramatically more cost-effective than other software in this space.
cons: There was an instance where processing of documents was delayed by several hours. It really wasn't a big deal, but it is honestly the worst I've experienced with the service.

description: Good data repository for collaborating with external and internal contributors.
author: Pieter L.
pros: I very much like the 'click-agreement' option, very useful as an NDA type agreement on due diligence type data room setups.
cons: Nothing comes to mind. We are not using any integration functionality at the moment.

author: Mireille A.
pros: Secured and easy to use for the uploaders and dowloaders
cons: The set up was not to easy, someone had to show me
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Used for file storage and file sharing
author: AMY V.
pros: I love how easy it is to drag and drop my files for uploading as well as how easy it is to move and copy files to different workspace locations
cons: The one thing that I would consider a con would be pricing...but i'm frugal..spending money per month seems a bit much to me.

description: It's easy to set up folders and set permissions for people to log in and access files you've posted or to post files themselves.
author: Chuck E.

review_title: A Great Cost-Effective Alternative for File Management, File Sharing and Virtual Data Room
description: For this type of product, I would call the overall experience excellent. I can’t think of any other package that I have not considered abandoning within five years, other than perhaps GSuite. I have never had downtime and 5he system meets our requirements.
author: Ronald E.
pros: I researched the moderate cost end of the virtual data room market carefully when I first started using OneHub about five years ago. It stood out from the competition at the time - and still does. It has solid VDR features, including access tracking, watermarking, notifications, access restrictions. It all works flawlessly. If a client user is already on someone else’s OneHub Implementation, they can use their existing account with the access added.
cons: I have only had two issues ever. One is that notifications would sometimes go out to users (sell-side clients and buyers) that I did not realize. I got that corrected. I initially used an even-lower cost version of OneHub that piggy-backed off DropBox. While the interface was good (the same as the standard version), it did not work well on the backend, frequently disconnecting from the Dropbox storage at inopportune moments. They dropped that version which, I suppose, was a technical challenge. I switched to the standard version and have been very happy. The issues we had were totally unique to the Dropbox version.

description: Experiencia muy buena, muy satisfecha con el software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que más me gusta es que puedo hacer mi trabajo igual que si estuviera en la oficina
cons: No hay ningún contra. Lo recomiendo totalmente

author: Mike N.
pros: The easy accessibility for my clients on both the their PC and phone APP. Clients are posting all their tax documents throughout the year as they receive it. Also, they are posting WORD documents with questions to ask me which can wait until time of prepping returns. The email notification feature is a win-win for both my office and my clients. Setting up a new clients with special permissions is done in minutes.
cons: Informing clients where to access their tax information since it's not a daily use of a tool for them.....one solution was to create a link as part of my email signature. Client's using it as their personal storage for data backup......resolution: Billed the client the OneHub annual fees my office pays......Poof!...data gone.

description: Onehub is a go to tool for me in all my businesses - period.
author: David S.
pros: Onehub starts as a great document repository for master corporate documents. From there it morphs into a great dataroom product where you can create multiple datarooms for various uses. I've used Onehub in my last 3 companies and also use it with 3 other companies on which I'm on their Board.
cons: I wish there was a workspace sharing function. It would be great to be able to create datarooms from documents shared or linked from the corporate secure repositories so we don't have to update things in two places. I also wish you could define the watermark density because the default watermark can wash out certain types of documents. Lastly, I wish someone could figure out how to not have invites land in Spam folders by being able to disable links in an invite or send the URL using xxxx at XXXX dot com

description: Excellent, and well worth the cost.
author: Thomas D.
pros: OneHub makes it easy to organize our virtual data room and to constantly revise it. The platform is also very good at managing user access at different levels. Of particular value are the daily emails that I get whenever someone accesses the data room and what they look at; it is a great way to gauge an investor's interest and focus. If I'm not seeing an investor accessing the data room, I know that they are not that interested, and vice versa. It's also a good way of keeping existing investors engaged because they get notice of new uploaded docs and visit the data room.
cons: Some outside users have had trouble accessing the data room from their work emails, and I've had to send them access via their personal emails. I think this is caused by firewall restrictions on their end.

description: So far I like the way things are set up other than a few minor tweaks to using the site.
author: Heather L.
pros: The ease of how our customer's can access real time jobs.
cons: The site could use some tweaking for a little more ease of use.

author: Nicholas S.
pros: I use this software for my small accounting business. I have multiple file structures for different clients and permissions to specific folders for different users. Works great for me and my clients.
cons: Wish i could nest files inside a folder without making a folder. Newer copies saved over the previous copy but it still remains retrievable unless i elect to delete, obviously limits and restrictions would apply.

author: Nicole B.
pros: This is literally the best server we have found for the price. We have NO issues, especially hooked up with FTP. We are so so grateful to have found OneHub.
cons: There aren't really any cons. The biggest might be explaining how to set up FTP for our users.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and friendly with non users
cons: It is not linked to office so it takes too long to save new documents

author: Isaac L.
pros: Easy setup for clients. Easy navigation. Like the roles to assign to different clients.
cons: Nothing to complain about OneHub portal.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: OneHub makes it very easy to authenticate new users and get them set up in your ecosystem.
cons: The tool just feels outdated. The UI lacks some of the basic features that its competitors have.

description: We work with multiple agencies and we are all very happy with One Hub!
author: Dawn C.
pros: Secure file sharing, offsite access, multiple users
cons: None, we are very happy with the software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
